CustomField.description: Check here to create an Invoice that does not accrue to the MR Fund. This field cannot be updated for a Reconciliation Schedule in Completed/Reconciled status. Please decline or cancel the related Invoice/Credit Memo to change the status of Reconciliation to ‘Open’.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check here to create an Invoice that does not accrue to the MR Fund. This field cannot be updated for a Reconciliation Schedule in Completed/Reconciled status. Please decline or cancel the related Invoice/Credit Memo to change the status of Reconciliation to ‘Open’.
CustomField.label: Not Maintenance Reserve
